title: × pseuditella micrantha
intro: × Pseuderanthus micrantha, also known as Pseuderanthus micrantha, is a plant species in the Gesneriaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pseuderanthus micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Pseuderanthus micrantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
